shlokas.translation: तस्मिन् by that, अस्त्रे missile, प्रतिहते counteracted, राक्षसाधिपः king of Rakshasas, रावणः Ravana, द्विगुणम् doubled the army, क्रोधम् angry, चक्रे, क्रोधात् in anger, अनन्तरम् later, अस्त्रम् missile
shlokas.explanation: Missile being counteracted, Ravana, the king of Rakshasas, doubled the army later in anger.
shlokas.comments: Ravana hits at Lakshmana with a sharp javelin. Rama and Ravana continue to fight both releasing a volley of arrows on one another.

shlokas.translation: महाद्युतिः highly effulgent, रावणः Ravana, मयेन by Maya, विहितम् manifested, रौद्रम् presided by Rudra, भीमम्terrific, अन्यत् another, अस्त्रम् missile, राघवाय Raghava, उत्सृष्टुं taking, प्रचक्रमे used
shlokas.explanation: Highly effulgent Ravana used another terrific missile, presided over by Rudra, produced by Maya.

shlokas.translation: ततः then, कार्मुकात् with bow, सर्वशःall over, वज्रसाराणि like the thunderbolt, दीप्यमानानि flaming, शूलानि trident, गदाश्च mace, मुसलानि च iron bar, निश्चेरुः issued forth
shlokas.explanation: Then from his bow issued forth all over flaming tridents, maces, and iron bars like thunderbolt.

shlokas.translation: विविधाःseveral kinds, तीक्ष्णाः sharp, मुद्गराः clubs, कूटपाशाश्च multitudes, तथा so also, दीप्ताःflaming, अशनयश्च thunderbolts, युगक्षये at the end of universal destruction, वाताःइव like gales, निष्पेतुः issued forth
shlokas.explanation: Several kinds of sharp multitudes of weapons and flaming thunderbolts issued forth like gales at the time of universal destruction.

shlokas.translation: श्रीमान् glorious, उत्तमास्त्रविदम् best of those proficient in the use of weapons, वरः foremost, मह्यद्युतिः endowed with great splendour, राघवः Raghava, तत् that, अस्त्रम् missile, गान्धर्वेण presided over by Gandharvas, परमास्त्रण supreme missiles, जघान neutralized
shlokas.explanation: Glorious Raghava, who is the best of those proficient in the use of missiles endowed with great splendour, neutralized that missile (of Ravana) with the missile presided over by Gandharvas.

shlokas.translation: महात्मना great self, राघवेण by Raghava, तस्मिन् the aforesaid, अस्त्र missile, प्रतिहते turned void, रावणः Ravana, क्रोधताम्राक्षःeyes turned red in anger, सौरम् अस्त्रम् missile presided by sun god, उदैरयत् used
shlokas.explanation: When the missile of Ravana was turned void by the great selfRaghava, Ravana's eyes turned red in anger, and he used a missile presided over by the Sun God.

shlokas.translation: ततः thereafter, भीमवेगस्य in terrific speed, धीमतः wise, दशग्रीवस्य Ravana's, कार्मुकात् bow, भास्वराणि of the sun god, महान्ति brilliant, चक्राणि discuses, निष्पेतुः issued forth
shlokas.explanation: Thereafter, brilliant discus of the Sun God, issued forth from wise Ravana's bow at a terrific speed.

shlokas.translation: रितस्ततःas they landed, सम्पतद्भिः together from the sky, पतद्भिश्च falling, तैः they, दीप्ता glowing, चन्द्रसूर्यग्रहैरिव like the moon sun and planets, गगनम् the sky, आसीत् illuminated, दिशश्च the quarters
shlokas.explanation: As they landed together from the sky glowing like Sun, moon, and the planets, it illuminated the quarters.

shlokas.shloka_text: तानिचिच्छेदबाणौघैश्चक्राणितु स राघवः । आयुधानि च चित्राणिरावणस्यचमूमुखे ।।6.101.9।।
shlokas.translation: सःराघवः that Raghava, बाणौघैः shafts, तानि them, चक्राणि discuses, रावणस्य of Ravana, आयुधानि च and the weapons, चमूमुखे forefront of army, चिच्छेद shattered
shlokas.explanation: Raghava with his shafts shattered the discuses and the weapons of Ravana in the forefront of his army.

shlokas.translation: राक्षसाधिपः Rakshasa king, रावणः Ravana, तत् that, अस्त्रम् missile, हतम् frustrated, दृष्टवा seeing, दशभिः ten, बाणैः shafts, रामम् at Rama, सर्वेषु all sides, मर्मसु private parts, विव्याध pierced
shlokas.explanation: Rakshasa king, frustrated on seeing the missiles, pierced Rama in his private parts with shafts.

shlokas.translation: रावणेन by Ravana, महाकार्मुकनिस्सृतैः from the huge bow, दशभिः ten, बाणैः arrows, विद्धः pierced, महातेजाः endowed with high energy, सःराघवः Raghava, न प्राकम्पत not shaken
shlokas.explanation: Even though pierced by Ravana with ten arrows, Rama, endowed with high energy, was not shaken.

shlokas.translation: ततः then, समितिञ्जयः who won battles, राघवस्तु at Raghava, सुसङ्क्रुद्धः highly furious, रावणम् Ravana, बहुभिः many, शरैः arrows, सर्वेषु all sides, गात्रेषु limbs, विव्याध pierced
shlokas.explanation: Then, Raghava, who had won many battles, became highly furious, piercing Ravana in all his limbs with many arrows.

shlokas.translation: एतस्मिन् in the meantime, अन्तरे, क्रुद्धः enraged, राघवस्य Raghava's, अनुजः brother, बली mighty, परवीरहा warrior, लक्ष्मणः Lakshmana, सप्त seven, सायकान् shafts, जग्राह seized
shlokas.explanation: In the meantime, enraged Lakshmana, the brother of Rama, a mighty warrior, seized hold of seven shafts.

shlokas.translation: महाद्युतिः endowed with extraordinary splendour, महावेगैः at high speed, तैःसायकैः those shafts, तस्य his, रावणस्य Ravana's, मनुष्यशीर्षम् device of human head, ध्वजम् flag post, नैकधा one, चिच्छेद shattered
shlokas.explanation: Lakshmana, who was endowed with extraordinary splendour, for his part, with his shafts which had great force, shattered the device of man's head on the flag post of Ravana.

shlokas.translation: श्रीमान् celebrated, महाबलः mighty, लक्ष्मणः Lakshmana, बाणेन by the arrows, नैरृतस्य night ranger's, सारथेः charioteer, ज्वलितकुण्डलम् glittering earrings, शिरः head, जहार struck
shlokas.explanation: Celebrated, mighty Lakshmana struck with his arrows, that hit the head of the charioteer of night ranger, which was glittering with earrings.

shlokas.translation: तदा then, लक्ष्मणः Lakshmana, निशितैः sharpened, पञ्चभिः five, बाणैः arrows, तस्यराक्षसेन्द्रस्य that king of Rakshasa's, गजकरोपमम् resembling the trunk of elephant, धनुः bow, चिच्छेद split
shlokas.explanation: Then Lakshmana split with five sharpened arrows the bow of Rakshasa king that resembled elephant's trunk.

shlokas.translation: विभीषणः Vibheeshana, आप्लुत्य formidable, गदया with mace, अस्य his, रावणस्य Ravana's, नीलमेघनिभान् like dark cloud, पर्वतोपमान् like mountain, सदश्वान् his horses, जघाम struck
shlokas.explanation: Vibheeshana struck with his formidable mace the horses of Ravana which were like dark clouds and huge like mountains.

shlokas.translation: तदा then, रावणः Ravana, हताश्वात् dead horses, महारथात् huge chariot, वेगात् speedily, अवप्लुत्य descended, भ्रातरंप्रति against brother, तीव्रम् violent, कोपम् rage, आहारयत् exhibited
shlokas.explanation: With the horses of his chariot dead, Ravana descended from the huge chariot and exhibited violent rage against his brother.

shlokas.translation: ततः then, महाशक्तिः of extraordinary energy, प्रतापवान् powerful leader, राक्षसेन्द्र Rakshasa king, प्रदीप्ताम् flaming, अशनीमिव thunderbolt like, शक्तिम् javelin, विभीषणस्य at Vibheeshana, चिक्षेप hurled
shlokas.explanation: Then, endowed with extraordinary energy, the powerful leader of Rakshasas hurled a flaming thunderbolt like javelin at Vibheeshana.

shlokas.translation: लक्ष्मणः Lakshmana, अप्राप्तामेव even before it reached, ताम् those, त्रिभिः three, बाणैः shafts, चिच्छेद shattered, अथ and then, महारणए in that huge conflict, वानराणाम् Vanaras, सन्नादःcheered, उदतिष्ठत rose
shlokas.explanation: Lakshmana shattered the javelin with three shafts even before it reached him (Vibheeshana). Then the Vanaras raised loud cheer in that huge conflict.

shlokas.translation: स: he, त्रिधा three parts, छिन्ना broken, काञ्चनमालिनी covered with gold, शक्तिः javelins, दिवः heaven, च्युता broken, महोल्केव like a huge meteor firestick, सविस्फुलिङ्गा emitting fire sparks, पपात fallen
shlokas.explanation: The javelin, which was covered with gold, broke into three parts, and fell down like a huge meteor emitting fire sparks from the heavens.

shlokas.translation: ततः then, सम्भाविततराम् which was renowned, कालेनापि for the god of death too, दुरासदाम् formidable, स्वतेजसा shining in its own splendour, दीप्यमानम् shining, विपुलाम् huge, शक्तिम् javelin, जग्राह seized
shlokas.explanation: Then, Ravana seized hold of a huge javelin shining with its own splendour, a formidable one even for the god of death.

shlokas.translation: बलवता mighty, दुरात्मना evil minded, रावणेन by Ravana, वेगिता endowed with speed, सुमहातेजाः highly energetic, दीप्ताशनिसमप्रभा splendorous like thunderbolt, सा that javelin, जज्वाल shone
shlokas.explanation: That javelin was endowed with speed, resembling thunderbolt in splendour, whirled round by the mighty and evilminded Ravana, shone.

shlokas.translation: एतस्मिन् in the meantime, अन्तरे, वीरः hero, लक्ष्मणः Lakshmana, प्राणसंशयम् life in danger, आपन्नम् reached, तंविभीषणम् him, that Vibheeshana, तूर्णम् speedily, अभ्यनपद्यत reached and stood obstructing
shlokas.explanation: In the meantime, seeing Vibheeshana's life in danger, heroic Lakshmana reached him and stood obstructing (the javelin).

shlokas.translation: वीरः heroic, लक्ष्मणः Lakshmana, तम् him, विमोचयितुम् to relieve, चापम् bow, आयम्य stretched, शक्तिहन्तम् having javelin in hand, रावणम् Ravana's, शरवर्षैः volley of arrows, अवाकिरत् covered
shlokas.explanation: Heroic Lakshmana stretched his bow and showered volley of arrows and covered Ravana who held javelin in hand.

shlokas.translation: महात्मना great self, विसृष्टेन stream of, शरौघेण covered by discharged shafts, कीर्यमाणः to shake his hand, विमुखीकृतविक्रमः not inclined to strike, प्रहर्तुम्, मनः in his mind, न चक्रे not strike
shlokas.explanation: Covered by the stream of shafts discharged by the great self, Lakshmana, Ravana could not shake his hand and was not inclined in his mind to strike (Vibheeshana).

shlokas.translation: सःरावणः that Ravana, लक्ष्मणेन by Lakshmana, भ्रातरम् brother, मोक्षितम् rescued, दृष्टवा seeing, लक्ष्मणाभिमुखःfacing Lakshmana, तिष्ठन् stood, इदम् these, वचनम् words, अब्रवीत् spoke
shlokas.explanation: Thus spoke Ravana seeing Lakshmana who stood facing him, who rescued his brother (Vibheeshana).

shlokas.translation: बलश्लाघिन् proud of your might, यस्मात् your, विभीषणः Vibheeshana, ते by you, एवम् in this way, मोक्षितः rescued, इयम् this, शक्तिः javelin, राक्षसम् Rakshasa, विमुच्य released from me, त्वयि on you, विनिपात्यते will strike at
shlokas.explanation: "Lakshmana! You are proud of your might of rescuing Vibheeshana. Now this javelin released from me will strike at you."

shlokas.translation: लोहितलक्षणा bludgeonlike arm, मद्भाहुपरिघोत्सृष्टा released by my arm, एषा in that way, शक्तिः javelin, ते your, हृदयम् heart, भित्त्वा piercing, प्राणान् life, आदाय taking out, यास्यति will take away
shlokas.explanation: "This javelin released by my bludgeonlike arm will pierce your heart and take away your life."

shlokas.shloka_text: इत्येवमुक्तातांशक्तिमष्टघण्टांमहास्वनाम् । मयेनमायाविहिताममोघंशत्रुघातिनीम् ।।6.101.30।। लक्ष्मणायसमुद्धिश्यज्वलन्तीमिवतेजसा । रावणःपरमक्रुद्धश्चिक्षेप च ननाद च ।।6.101.31।।
shlokas.translation: परमक्रुद्धः very angry, रावणः Ravana, इत्येवम् in this way, उक्त्वा having spoken, अष्टघण्टाम् adorned with eight bells, महास्वनाम् loud noise, मयेन by Maya, मायाविहिताम् designed with magic, अमोघम् stupendous, शत्रुविघातिनीम् capable of destroying any enemy, तेजसा shone, ज्वलन्तीमिव like glowing, तांशक्तिम् that javelin, लक्ष्मणाय on Lakshmana, समुद्धिश्य aiming at, चिक्षेप hurled, ननाद च and roared
shlokas.explanation: Enraged Ravana, having spoken in this manner, hurled the javelin adorned with eight bells making loud noise, designed magically by Maya, a stupendous one capable of destroying any enemy, which was glowing with shine, aiming at Lakshmana, and roared aloud.

shlokas.shloka_text: इत्येवमुक्तातांशक्तिमष्टघण्टांमहास्वनाम् । मयेनमायाविहिताममोघंशत्रुघातिनीम् ।।6.101.30।। लक्ष्मणायसमुद्धिश्यज्वलन्तीमिवतेजसा । रावणःपरमक्रुद्धश्चिक्षेप च ननाद च ।।6.101.31।।
shlokas.translation: परमक्रुद्धः very angry, रावणः Ravana, इत्येवम् in this way, उक्त्वा having spoken, अष्टघण्टाम् adorned with eight bells, महास्वनाम् loud noise, मयेन by Maya, मायाविहिताम् designed with magic, अमोघम् stupendous, शत्रुविघातिनीम् capable of destroying any enemy, तेजसा shone, ज्वलन्तीमिव like glowing, तांशक्तिम् that javelin, लक्ष्मणाय on Lakshmana, समुद्धिश्य aiming at, चिक्षेप hurled, ननाद च and roared
shlokas.explanation: Enraged Ravana, having spoken in this manner, hurled the javelin adorned with eight bells making loud noise, designed magically by Maya, a stupendous one capable of destroying any enemy, which was glowing with shine, aiming at Lakshmana, and roared aloud.

shlokas.translation: भीमवेगेन at terrific speed, क्षिप्ता hurled, वज्राशनिसमस्वना equal to thunderbolt, साशक्तिः that javelin, रणमूर्धनि forefront of war, वेगात् speedily, लक्ष्मणम् towards Lakshmana, अभ्यपतत् went
shlokas.explanation: Hurled at terrific speed, that javelin, which was equal to thunderbolt, speedily went towards Lakshmana in the forefront of war.

shlokas.translation: सःराघवः that Raghava, आपतन्तीम् coming towards, तांशक्तिम् that javelin, लक्ष्मणाय towards Lakshman, स्वस्ति may he be auspicious, अस्तु be, मोघा well, हतोद्यमा to kill Lakshmana, भव your, इति this, अनुव्याहरत् be ineffective and wasted
shlokas.explanation: Seeing the javelin coming towards Lakshmana, Raghava said 'May Lakshmana be auspicious. May he be well. May your attempt to kill Lakshmana be ineffective and wasted'.

shlokas.translation: क्रुद्धेन in anger, रावणेन by Ravana, रणे in battle, मुक्ता liberated, आशीविषोपमा like poison of venomous serpent, साशक्तिः that javelin, आशुstood, अभीतस्य fearless, लक्ष्मणस्य on Lakshmana, उरसि chest, ममज्ज pierced
shlokas.explanation: Released by Ravana in anger, that javelin, which was like poison of venomous serpent, pierced into the chest of Lakshmana who stood fearless.

shlokas.translation: उरगराजस्य king of serpents, Vasuki, दीप्यमाना glowing, जिह्वेव like tongue, महाद्युतिःflaming, महावेगा at high speed, सा that javelin, लक्ष्मणस्य Lakshman's, महोरपि broad chest, न्यपतत् descended on
shlokas.explanation: Glowing like the tongue of Vasuki, the king of serpents, flaming, त्त्जवेलिन descended at high speed on the chest of Lakshmana.

shlokas.translation: ततः thereafter, रावणवेगेन speedily by Ravana, सुदूरम् very long, अवगाढया plunged into, विभिन्नहृदयः penetrated deep into the heart, लक्ष्मणः Lakshman, भुवि on ground, पपात fell
shlokas.explanation: Thereafter, Lakshmana fell on the ground, pierced by the javelin, deep into the heart from far with great force by Ravana.

shlokas.translation: महातेजाः most courageous, समीपस्थः nearby, राघवः Raghava, तदवस्थम् that situation, लक्ष्मणम् of Lakshmana, प्रेक्ष्य watching, भ्रातृस्नेहात् because of brotherly affection, विषण्णहृदयः felt despondent at heart, अभवत् became
shlokas.explanation: Watching Lakshmana in that situation, most courageous Raghava, out of brotherly affection felt despondent at heart.

shlokas.translation: सः he, मुहूर्तमिव for a short while, ध्यात्वा as it is, बाष्पपर्याकुलेक्षणः eyes filled with tears, युगान्ते at the end of universe, पावकःइव like fire, सम्रब्दतरः as if confused, बभूव stood
shlokas.explanation: He (Raghava) stood confused for a short while as it was, his eyes filled with tears like fire at the end of the universe.

shlokas.translation: अयम् this, विषादस्य disconsolate, कालः time, नःnot, इति now, सञ्चिन्त्य realizing, लक्ष्मणम् Lakshmana, परिवीक्ष्य observing, राघवः Raghava, रावणस्य Ravana's, वधे destruction, धृतःdetermined, महता great, सर्वयत्नेन all efforts, सुतुमुलम् fierce struggle, युद्धम् battle, चक्रे started
shlokas.explanation: Realizing that this is not the time to be disconsolate, observing Lakshmana's efforts, Raghava resolved to destroy Ravana and started a fierce struggle.

shlokas.translation: ततः then, सःरामः that Rama, महाहवे great war, शक्त्या javelin, भिन्नम् pierced, रुधिरादिग्धम् bathed in blood, सपन्नगम् like snake, अचलम् इव like mountain, लक्ष्मणम् Lakshmana, ददर्श beheld
shlokas.explanation: Rama beheld Lakshmana pierced with javelin in the great war bathed in blood and resembling a mountain with a snake penetrated into it.

shlokas.translation: रक्षसा Rakshasa, क्षिप्रहस्तेन released from his hand, बाणौघैः by the arrows, अर्दिताःचैव pained, ते they, हरिश्रेष्ठाः best of Vanaras, बलीयसा with great strength, रावणेन by Ravana, प्रहिताम् discharged, ताम् them, शक्तिम् javelin, यत्नतःअपि effort also, अवमर्दितुम् to pull out, न शेकुः not feasible
shlokas.explanation: It was not feasible for the best of Vanaras to pull out the javelin (from Lakshmana's body) discharged with great strength from Ravana's hand, despite great efforts.

shlokas.translation: रक्षसा Rakshasa, क्षिप्रहस्तेन released from his hand, बाणौघैः by the arrows, अर्दिताःचैव pained, ते they, हरिश्रेष्ठाः best of Vanaras, बलीयसा with great strength, रावणेन by Ravana, प्रहिताम् discharged, ताम् them, शक्तिम् javelin, यत्नतःअपि effort also, अवमर्दितुम् to pull out, न शेकुः not feasible
shlokas.explanation: It was not feasible for the best of Vanaras to pull out the javelin (from Lakshmana's body) discharged with great strength from Ravana's hand, despite great efforts.

shlokas.translation: सा that, सौमित्रि: Saumithri, विनिर्भिद्य piercing through, धरणीतलम् the ground, प्रविष्टा entered, बलवान् mighty, रामः Rama, समरे in battle, क्रुद्धः enraged, भयापहाम् terrific, तांशक्तिम् that javelin, कराभ्याम् with both hands, परामृश्य bending it, विचकर्ष in the course of struggle, बभञ्ज च removed
shlokas.explanation: It pierced through Lakshmana's body and entered into the earth. Mighty Rama held the terrific javelin with both hands bent it and removed in the course of struggle.

shlokas.translation: बलीयसा mighty courageous, रावणेन by Ravana, शक्तिम् javelin, निष्कर्षतः while pulling out, तस्य his, सर्वेषु all over, गात्रेषु the limbs, मर्मभेदिनः private parts also, शराः arrows, पातिताः struck
shlokas.explanation: While Rama was pulling out the javelin, mighty and courageous Ravana struck him in his private parts and all over the body with arrows.

shlokas.shloka_text: अचिन्तयित्वातान्बाणान्समालशिष्य च लक्ष्मणम् ।।6.101.45।। अब्रवीच्चहनूमन्तंसुग्रीवं च महाकपिम् ।
shlokas.translation: तान् those, बाणान् arrows, अचिन्तयित्वा not minding, लक्ष्मणम् Lakshmana, समालशिष्य embracing, हनूमन्तम् to Hanumantha, महाकपिम् great Vanara, सुग्रीवंच Sugriva also, अब्रवीच्छ spoke
shlokas.explanation: Not minding the arrows struck, Rama embraced Lakshmana and spoke to Hanumantha and the great Vanara Sugriva.

shlokas.translation: वानरोत्तमाः O foremost of Vanaras, लक्ष्मणम् Lakshmana, परिवार्यैव surrounding, पापात्मा sinful, पापनिश्चयः of sinful resolve, अयंदशग्रीवः this ten headed, वध्यताम् will put an end, घर्माने rightfully, स्तोककस्य chataka bird, काङ्क्षितम् desire, मेघदर्शनिमव just as clouds appeared, मे for me, चिरेप्सितःfor a long time, अयम् this, पराक्रमस्यकालः time to exhibit valour, सम्प्राप्तः has come अस्मिन् मुहूर्ते in a short while now
shlokas.explanation: "O foremost of Vanaras! Take care of Lakshmana by surrounding him. Just as clouds appeared before the chataka bird waiting for long, time has come to exhibit my valour which was awaited for long. Now I will destroy the ten headed Ravana of sinful resolve rightfully in a short while from now."
